notes: Reset to empty on 2026-06-18 for a full from-scratch run. Categories are rebuilt from the raw corpus via `register` (Tier-1 include/exclude regexes over NORMALIZED text; exclusions resolve sibling overlaps). The previous hand-curated 120-category register is recoverable from git commit 9c6e10c. Each category carries corpus_regex (raw-text filter for the schema strawman) and a canonical_example golden fixture; schemas live as versioned JSON under schemas/.
